hero.sub: From Sabang to Merauke — verified housing choices, transparent pricing, and direct contact with owners.

about.desc: We believe finding a home shouldn't be complicated. Partner Livingku brings a directory where every listing is verified — real photos, transparent pricing, and owners ready via WhatsApp.
about.f1Desc: Every property is checked by our team — address, facilities, and owner authenticity.
about.f2Desc: No hidden fees. The displayed price is what you pay.
about.f3Desc: Photos taken on-site — no generic images from the internet.
about.f4Desc: Our team is online Monday–Sunday, 08:00–21:00 WIB. We reply in minutes.
about.statsH3: Trusted by thousands of home seekers
about.statsSub: Since 2026, we continue to grow with the co-living and apartment community in Indonesia.

services.desc: Comprehensive property management solutions — from daily operations to digital marketing and tenant management.

units.h2: Find the Right Home For You
units.desc: Choose a category that fits your needs — all verified and ready for direct contact.

testimonials.emptySub: Be the first to provide a testimonial!

faq.desc: Can't find the answer? Chat directly with our team via WhatsApp — we usually reply within 5 minutes.

contact.desc: Our team is ready to help Monday–Sunday, 08:00–21:00 WIB. Just chat via WhatsApp — we reply in minutes.
